title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER VALLEY HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, dental, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1220 Indian Creek Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: K-12 students in Hood River County Hours: During school year: Monday-Thursday 8am-1pm and 1:30pm -5pm, Friday 8am-2pm Summer: Tuesday/Thursday 8am-noon from July 2-July 23 (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (541) 386-6380 OCH Hood River Clinic INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-1pm and 1:30pm-5pm, Friday 8am-2pm Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER VALLEY HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
